com.pax.poslink

Class PosLink

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
      • com.pax.poslink.PosLink

  • public class PosLink
extends AbstractPosLink
    This class implement communication with POS terminal which comply with "PAX_Interface_Between_ECR_PC_and_Terminal". The ECR developer needn't to care about the payment transaction and its compliance., and can focus on application transaction processing. There are five types of business handled by ECR SDK, Management, Payment Transaction, Batch, Report and Communication Setting. Management allows the control program to do certain single action on the terminal (such as displaying a message on the screen). Payment Transaction traverses a series of screens and handle all of the communication with the host processor. Batch is used to manage the batch operations. Report is used to get the local or host report. And Communication Setting is to set communicate parameters of Terminal

    • Nested Class Summary

        public PosLink()

        Construction method Initial a newly create POSLink object .

        This is deprecated, please use PosLink(Context) or POSLinkCreator.createPoslink(Context) instead.

    • Method Detail

      • ProcessTrans

        public ProcessTransResult ProcessTrans()
        Description copied from class: AbstractPosLink

        Send message according to the input objects ,and the receive response from POS terminal and unpack it,then create the corresponding response object. User should get the response items from PaymentResponse,anageResponse,BatchResponse or ReportResponse object.Notes the response object is only valid while the ProcessTransResult.Code is OK

        This method will start connection with POS. It is must to put it in a background thread and wait for its result. If it is run in the main thread it will return an error: Cannot Run in Main Thread.

        Overrides:
        ProcessTrans in class AbstractPosLink
        Returns:
        the ProcessTransResult object with specify result
        See Also:
        ProcessTransResult

      • ProcessTrans

        public ProcessTransResult ProcessTrans(java.lang.String request)
        Description copied from class: AbstractPosLink
        Send low-level messages and return the Response from POS terminal. The Response is in ProcessTransResult.Response.

        This method will start connection with POS. It is must to put it in a background thread and wait for its result. If it is run in the main thread it will return an error: Cannot Run in Main Thread.

        Overrides:
        ProcessTrans in class AbstractPosLink
        Parameters:
        request - low-level message
        Returns:
        the ProcessTransResult object with specify result
        See Also:
        ProcessTransResult

      • ProcessTrans

        public ProcessTransResult ProcessTrans(java.util.List<java.lang.String> requestList)
        Description copied from class: AbstractPosLink
        Send low-level messages and return the list of Response from POS terminal. The list of Response is in ProcessTransResult.Responses.

        This method will start connection with POS. It is must to put it in a background thread and wait for its result. If it is run in the main thread it will return an error: Cannot Run in Main Thread.

        Overrides:
        ProcessTrans in class AbstractPosLink
        Parameters:
        requestList - the list of low-level message
        Returns:
        the ProcessTransResult object with specify result
        See Also:
        ProcessTransResult
